card_description: Gabriel is a divine or mythological figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Associated with dictionary terms: Gabriel. Context: "Dick proposes a radical theory: humans are not "fallen men" but "fallen angels" with degenerated memories and powers."
